title: [FIRRTL] (add, sub) type mismatch between destination and source

features.name: mixed signedness subtraction with unsigned operand
features.description: Code should include a subtraction operation where one operand is a signed value and the other is an unsigned value converted to signed via cast, producing a result that exceeds 64 bits

features.name: add operation with unsigned to signed conversion
features.description: Code should include an addition operation where an unsigned value is explicitly cast to signed and added to another signed value, with result width exceeding original operand widths

features.name: assignment from signed expression to unsigned variable
features.description: Code should include assigning a signed expression result (from mixed signedness operation) to an unsigned variable where both have the same width
